content.text: I see the SQL injection vulnerability Marco Vitale flagged in PHOENIX-1234. The `get_user_by_email()` function uses f-string formatting to build the query, which allows injection. Let me fix it with parameterized queries:

input.old_string:
query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '{email}'"  # SQL INJECTION!
    result = db_conn.execute(query)
input.new_string:
query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?"
    result = db_conn.execute(query, (email,))
